transpilation.sql: SELECT * FROM a LEFT SEMI JOIN b ON a.id = b.id

write.duckdb: SELECT * FROM a LEFT SEMI JOIN b ON a.id = b.id
write.postgresql: SELECT * FROM a WHERE EXISTS((SELECT 1 FROM b WHERE a.id = b.id))
write.mysql: SELECT * FROM a WHERE EXISTS((SELECT 1 FROM b WHERE a.id = b.id))
write.snowflake: SELECT * FROM a WHERE EXISTS((SELECT 1 FROM b WHERE a.id = b.id))
write.spark: SELECT * FROM a LEFT SEMI JOIN b ON a.id = b.id
write.tsql: SELECT * FROM a WHERE EXISTS((SELECT 1 FROM b WHERE a.id = b.id))

transpilation.description: LEFT SEMI JOIN to EXISTS for dialects that lack semi join support

transpilation.sql: SELECT * FROM a LEFT ANTI JOIN b ON a.id = b.id

write.duckdb: SELECT * FROM a LEFT ANTI JOIN b ON a.id = b.id
write.postgresql: SELECT * FROM a WHERE NOT EXISTS((SELECT 1 FROM b WHERE a.id = b.id))
write.mysql: SELECT * FROM a WHERE NOT EXISTS((SELECT 1 FROM b WHERE a.id = b.id))
write.snowflake: SELECT * FROM a WHERE NOT EXISTS((SELECT 1 FROM b WHERE a.id = b.id))
write.spark: SELECT * FROM a LEFT ANTI JOIN b ON a.id = b.id
write.tsql: SELECT * FROM a WHERE NOT EXISTS((SELECT 1 FROM b WHERE a.id = b.id))

transpilation.description: LEFT ANTI JOIN to NOT EXISTS for dialects that lack anti join support

transpilation.sql: SELECT * FROM t QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY x) = 1

write.duckdb: SELECT * FROM t QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY x) = 1
write.snowflake: SELECT * FROM t QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY x) = 1
write.postgresql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY x) AS _w FROM t) AS _t WHERE _w = 1
write.mysql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY x) AS _w FROM t) AS _t WHERE _w = 1
write.spark: SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY x NULLS LAST) AS _w FROM t) AS _t WHERE _w = 1
write.tsql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CASE WHEN x IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, x) AS _w FROM t) AS _t WHERE _w = 1

transpilation.description: QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER elimination for dialects without QUALIFY

transpilation.sql: SELECT * FROM t QUALIFY RANK() OVER (ORDER BY x) <= 3

write.duckdb: SELECT * FROM t QUALIFY RANK() OVER (ORDER BY x) <= 3
write.snowflake: SELECT * FROM t QUALIFY RANK() OVER (ORDER BY x) <= 3
write.postgresql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY x) AS _w FROM t) AS _t WHERE _w <= 3
write.mysql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY x) AS _w FROM t) AS _t WHERE _w <= 3
write.spark: SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY x NULLS LAST) AS _w FROM t) AS _t WHERE _w <= 3
write.tsql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY CASE WHEN x IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, x) AS _w FROM t) AS _t WHERE _w <= 3

transpilation.description: QUALIFY RANK elimination for dialects without QUALIFY
